sourceDocuments.name: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)

objects.name: Applicant
objects.description: A prospective insured submitting a commercial property risk for underwriting.
objects.descriptionZh: 提交商业财产风险进行核保的潜在被保险人。
objects.relationship_description: Applicant submits Submission. Applicant holds Policy.

sources.snippet: ### 2.1 Applicant (PolicyCenter)
`prior_loss_count_36m` | integer | drives `[BR-16]`

objects.name: Submission
objects.description: A broker-originated application package for a commercial property risk, cleared and assessed before quoting.
objects.descriptionZh: 由经纪人发起的商业财产风险申请包，在报价前需完成查重与风险评估。
objects.relationship_description: Applicant submits Submission. Submission assessed by RiskAssessment. Submission yields Quote. Submission.applicant_id references Applicant.

sources.snippet: ### 2.2 Submission (PolicyCenter)

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: produces a new `Submission` record in `Cleared` = false state and links it to an `Applicant`.

objects.name: RiskAssessment
objects.description: The underwriter's evaluation of a submission producing a risk score and proposed coverage list.
objects.descriptionZh: 核保人对投保申请的评估，产出风险评分及拟议承保险别清单。
objects.relationship_description: Submission assessed by RiskAssessment. RiskAssessment.submission_id references Submission.

properties.name: referral_flagged
properties.description: True when an eligibility threshold under [BR-02]/[BR-03] is hit.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: produces a `RiskAssessment` with a risk score and proposed `Coverage` list.

objects.name: Quote
objects.description: A priced offer of coverage with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits, valid for a fixed window.
objects.descriptionZh: 含分项保费、免赔额与限额的承保报价，具固定有效期。
objects.relationship_description: Submission yields Quote. Quote binds to Policy. Quote.submission_id references Submission.

sources.snippet: ### 2.3 Quote (PolicyCenter)

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: produces a `Quote` with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits.

objects.name: Policy
objects.description: A bound commercial property insurance contract with an effective and expiry date, materializing coverages and premium.
objects.descriptionZh: 已承保的商业财产保险合同，具生效与失效日期，并落实各险别与保费。
objects.relationship_description: Quote binds to Policy. Applicant holds Policy. Policy contains Coverage. Policy priced by Premium. Claim filed against Policy. Policy.applicant_id references Applicant.

sources.snippet: ### 2.4 Policy (PolicyCenter)

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: produces a `Policy` in `Bound` status with an effective date and expiry date

objects.name: Coverage
objects.description: A peril-specific grant of cover on a policy with a limit and deductible.
objects.descriptionZh: 保单上针对特定危险的承保，含限额与免赔额。
objects.relationship_description: Policy contains Coverage. Exposure covers Coverage. Coverage.policy_id references Policy.

sources.snippet: ### 2.5 Coverage (PolicyCenter)

objects.name: Premium
objects.description: The annual amount charged for a bound policy, computed by RatingEngine subject to a minimum-premium floor.
objects.descriptionZh: 已承保保单的年度收费，由费率引擎计算并受最低保费下限约束。
objects.relationship_description: Policy priced by Premium. Premium.policy_id references Policy.

sources.snippet: ### 2.6 Premium (PolicyCenter / RatingEngine)

objects.name: Claim
objects.description: A reported loss against a policy, opened at First Notice of Loss and resolved through adjudication and settlement.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对保单报告的损失，于首次报损时立案，经理算与结案处理。
objects.relationship_description: Claim filed against Policy. Claim comprises Exposure. Adjuster handles Claim. Claim recovers via Recovery. Claim.policy_number references Policy.

sources.snippet: ### 2.7 Claim (ClaimCenter)

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: produces a new `Claim` linked to the matched `Policy`, and opens at least one `Exposure` per affected `Coverage`.

objects.name: Exposure
objects.description: A claim's exposure to loss under a single coverage, carrying a coverage decision, reserve, and payment.
objects.descriptionZh: 理赔案件在单一险别下的损失敞口，承载承保决定、准备金与赔款。
objects.relationship_description: Claim comprises Exposure. Exposure covers Coverage. Exposure reserves Reserve. Exposure pays ClaimPayment. Exposure.claim_id references Claim. Exposure.coverage_id references Coverage.

sources.snippet: ### 2.8 Exposure (ClaimCenter)

objects.name: Reserve
objects.description: The estimated outstanding liability set aside on an open exposure, reviewed periodically and decremented on payment.
objects.descriptionZh: 为未结赔付项预留的预估未决负债，需定期复核并在赔付时冲减。
objects.relationship_description: Exposure reserves Reserve. Reserve.exposure_id references Exposure.

sources.snippet: ### 2.9 Reserve (ClaimCenter)

objects.name: ClaimPayment
objects.description: A disbursement against an exposure, subject to adjuster/supervisor authority limits and approval.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对赔付项的赔款支付，受理算员/主管授权限额及审批约束。
objects.relationship_description: Exposure pays ClaimPayment. ClaimPayment.exposure_id references Exposure.

sources.snippet: ### 2.10 ClaimPayment (ClaimCenter → BillingCenter)

objects.name: Adjuster
objects.description: A claims handler assigned to manage a claim and its exposures within a payment authority limit.
objects.descriptionZh: 受指派管理理赔案件及其赔付项的理算人员，具支付授权限额。

sources.snippet: ### 2.11 Adjuster (ClaimCenter)

objects.name: Recovery
objects.description: A subrogation recovery pursued against an identified liable third party after a claim is closed.
objects.descriptionZh: 理赔结案后针对已识别责任第三方进行的代位求偿追偿记录。
objects.relationship_description: Claim recovers via Recovery. Recovery.claim_id references Claim.

sources.snippet: ### 2.12 Recovery (ClaimCenter)

rules.standardizedLogicRule: Every Submission shall be cleared against existing Policy and Submission records for the same Applicant within 2 business days of receipt, and a duplicate submission may not proceed to risk assessment.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Clearance, referral, reinsurance, and decline gates before quoting.
rules.title: Duplicate clearance within 2 business days
rules.titleZh: 2个工作日内查重

statement.en: Every Submission shall be cleared against existing Policy and Submission records for the same Applicant within 2 business days of receipt, and a duplicate submission may not proceed to risk assessment.
statement.zh: 每份投保申请须在收到后2个工作日内，针对同一申请人的现有保单与投保申请记录完成查重，重复申请不得进入风险评估。

rules.formal: Submission.cleared = true required within 2 business days of receipt ∧ duplicate(Submission) → ¬proceedToRiskAssessment

sources.snippet: **[BR-01]** Every `Submission` shall be cleared against existing `Policy` and `Submission` records for the same `Applicant` within **2 business days** of receipt, and a duplicate submission may not proceed to risk assessment.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Submission for a single insured location with a Total Insured Value exceeding $50,000,000 may not be quoted without a documented facultative reinsurance arrangement on file.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Clearance, referral, reinsurance, and decline gates before quoting.
rules.title: TIV over $50M needs facultative reinsurance
rules.titleZh: 保险总价值超5000万需临分再保

statement.en: A Submission for a single insured location with a Total Insured Value exceeding $50,000,000 may not be quoted without a documented facultative reinsurance arrangement on file.
statement.zh: 单一被保险地点保险总价值超过5000万美元的投保申请，在未存档已确认临时分保安排前不得报价。

sources.snippet: **[BR-02]** A `Submission` for a single insured location with a Total Insured Value exceeding **$50,000,000** may not be quoted without a documented facultative reinsurance arrangement on file.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Tier-1 cat zone or limit over $10M referral
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Submission whose property is located in a Tier-1 catastrophe-exposed zone, or whose proposed limit exceeds $10,000,000, is required to be referred to an Underwriting Manager for approval before a Quote is issued.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Clearance, referral, reinsurance, and decline gates before quoting.
rules.title: Tier-1 cat zone or limit over $10M referral
rules.titleZh: 一级巨灾区或限额超1000万需转交

statement.en: A Submission whose property is located in a Tier-1 catastrophe-exposed zone, or whose proposed limit exceeds $10,000,000, is required to be referred to an Underwriting Manager for approval before a Quote is issued.
statement.zh: 财产位于一级巨灾暴露区域，或拟议限额超过1000万美元的投保申请，须在出具报价前转交核保经理审批。

rules.formal: (Submission.cat_zone_tier = Tier1 ∨ Coverage.limit > 10000000) → requires(UWM approval) before Quote

sources.snippet: **[BR-03]** A `Submission` whose property is located in a Tier-1 catastrophe-exposed zone, or whose proposed limit exceeds **$10,000,000**, is required to be referred to an Underwriting Manager for approval before a `Quote` is issued.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A bound Policy must carry an annual Premium of at least the minimum-premium floor of $2,500, regardless of computed rate.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Premium floor, deductible floor, quote validity, and effective-date window at quote/bind.
rules.title: Minimum annual premium $2,500
rules.titleZh: 最低年度保费2500美元

statement.en: A bound Policy must carry an annual Premium of at least the minimum-premium floor of $2,500, regardless of computed rate.
statement.zh: 已承保的保单必须承载至少2500美元最低保费下限的年度保费，无论计算费率如何。

sources.snippet: **[BR-06]** A bound `Policy` must carry an annual `Premium` of at least the minimum-premium floor of **$2,500**, regardless of computed rate.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Policy may not be bound with an effective date more than 30 days in the past, and may not be bound with an effective date in the future beyond 90 days.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Premium floor, deductible floor, quote validity, and effective-date window at quote/bind.
rules.title: Backdating / forward-dating window
rules.titleZh: 追溯与提前生效窗口

statement.en: A Policy may not be bound with an effective date more than 30 days in the past, and may not be bound with an effective date in the future beyond 90 days.
statement.zh: 保单的生效日期不得早于过去30天，也不得晚于未来90天。

expression.predicate: policy.effective_date >= today - duration('720h') && policy.effective_date <= today + duration('2160h')

sources.snippet: **[BR-07]** A `Policy` may not be bound with an effective date more than **30 days** in the past, and may not be bound with an effective date in the future beyond **90 days**.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Quote is valid for 60 days from issuance, and a Quote that has expired may not be bound without re-rating.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Premium floor, deductible floor, quote validity, and effective-date window at quote/bind.
rules.title: Quote valid 60 days
rules.titleZh: 报价有效期60天

statement.en: A Quote is valid for 60 days from issuance, and a Quote that has expired may not be bound without re-rating.
statement.zh: 报价自出具起60天内有效，已过期的报价未经重新核费不得用于承保。

sources.snippet: **[BR-14]** A `Quote` is valid for **60 days** from issuance, and a `Quote` that has expired may not be bound without re-rating.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Coverage deductible may not be set below the underwriting-guideline minimum of $5,000 for any commercial property peril.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Premium floor, deductible floor, quote validity, and effective-date window at quote/bind.
rules.title: Deductible minimum $5,000
rules.titleZh: 免赔额最低5000美元

statement.en: A Coverage deductible may not be set below the underwriting-guideline minimum of $5,000 for any commercial property peril.
statement.zh: 任何商业财产危险的承保险别免赔额不得低于核保指引最低5000美元。

sources.snippet: **[BR-15]** A `Coverage` deductible may not be set below the underwriting-guideline minimum of **$5,000** for any commercial property peril.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Applicant with two or more total-loss claims in the prior 36 months shall be declined unless an Underwriting Manager records a written exception.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Clearance, referral, reinsurance, and decline gates before quoting.
rules.title: Decline on 2+ total losses in 36m
rules.titleZh: 36个月内2次以上全损则拒保

statement.en: An Applicant with two or more total-loss claims in the prior 36 months shall be declined unless an Underwriting Manager records a written exception.
statement.zh: 过去36个月内有两次或以上全损理赔的申请人应予拒保，除非核保经理记录书面例外。

sources.snippet: **[BR-16]** An `Applicant` with two or more total-loss claims in the prior **36 months** shall be declined unless an Underwriting Manager records a written exception.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: No Coverage applies to a loss whose date of loss precedes the Policy effective date or follows the Policy expiry date.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: In-force date checks at FNOL.
rules.title: No coverage outside policy period
rules.titleZh: 保险期间外不予承保

statement.en: No Coverage applies to a loss whose date of loss precedes the Policy effective date or follows the Policy expiry date.
statement.zh: 出险日期早于保单生效日期或晚于保单失效日期的损失，不适用任何承保。

sources.snippet: **[BR-08]** No `Coverage` applies to a loss whose date of loss precedes the `Policy` effective date or follows the `Policy` expiry date.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Reserve set within 48 hours of FNOL
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Reserve must be set within 48 hours of First Notice of Loss on every open Exposure.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Reserve timing, periodic review, and large-loss approval.
rules.title: Reserve set within 48 hours of FNOL
rules.titleZh: 报案后48小时内设立准备金

statement.en: A Reserve must be set within 48 hours of First Notice of Loss on every open Exposure.
statement.zh: 每个未结赔付项必须在首次报损后48小时内设立准备金。

rules.formal: Exposure.status = Open → Reserve set within 48h of Claim.fnol_timestamp

sources.snippet: **[BR-09]** A `Reserve` must be set within **48 hours** of First Notice of Loss on every open `Exposure`.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: Every open Exposure is required to have its Reserve reviewed for adequacy at least every 90 days.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Reserve timing, periodic review, and large-loss approval.
rules.title: Reserve reviewed every 90 days
rules.titleZh: 准备金每90天复核

statement.en: Every open Exposure is required to have its Reserve reviewed for adequacy at least every 90 days.
statement.zh: 每个未结赔付项须至少每90天对其准备金充足性进行一次复核。

sources.snippet: **[BR-10]** Every open `Exposure` is required to have its `Reserve` reviewed for adequacy at least every **90 days**.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A ClaimPayment may not exceed the assigned Adjuster's authority limit of $25,000 per payment.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Adjuster/supervisor/manager payment authority ladder.
rules.title: Adjuster payment authority $25,000
rules.titleZh: 理算员赔付授权2.5万美元

statement.en: A ClaimPayment may not exceed the assigned Adjuster's authority limit of $25,000 per payment.
statement.zh: 单笔理赔赔款不得超过指派理算员2.5万美元的授权限额。

sources.snippet: **[BR-04]** A `ClaimPayment` may not exceed the assigned `Adjuster`'s authority limit of **$25,000** per payment.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A ClaimPayment above the Adjuster authority limit must be approved by a Claims Supervisor, and a ClaimPayment above the Supervisor limit of $100,000 shall be escalated to the Claims Manager.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Adjuster/supervisor/manager payment authority ladder.
rules.title: Supervisor / Manager payment escalation
rules.titleZh: 主管/经理赔付升级审批

statement.en: A ClaimPayment above the Adjuster authority limit must be approved by a Claims Supervisor, and a ClaimPayment above the Supervisor limit of $100,000 shall be escalated to the Claims Manager.
statement.zh: 超过理算员授权限额的赔款须经理赔主管批准，超过主管10万美元限额的赔款应升级至理赔经理。

rules.formal: ClaimPayment.amount > 25000 → requires(Supervisor approval); ClaimPayment.amount > 100000 → requires(Claims Manager approval)

sources.snippet: **[BR-05]** A `ClaimPayment` above the `Adjuster` authority limit must be approved by a Claims Supervisor, and a `ClaimPayment` above the Supervisor limit of **$100,000** shall be escalated to the Claims Manager.

rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Reserve set at or above $250,000 on any single Exposure is required to receive Claims Manager approval before it is posted.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Reserve timing, periodic review, and large-loss approval.
rules.title: Reserve >= $250,000 needs manager approval
rules.titleZh: 准备金达25万美元需经理批准

statement.en: A Reserve set at or above $250,000 on any single Exposure is required to receive Claims Manager approval before it is posted.
statement.zh: 任一赔付项上设立的达到或超过25万美元的准备金，须在入账前获得理赔经理批准。

rules.formal: Reserve.amount >= 250000 → requires(Claims Manager approval) before post

sources.snippet: **[BR-11]** A `Reserve` set at or above **$250,000** on any single `Exposure` is required to receive Claims Manager approval before it is posted.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Large loss to senior adjuster in 24h
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Claim with an estimated total incurred loss at or above $500,000 must be assigned to a senior Adjuster within 24 hours of coverage confirmation.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Assignment, closure, payment eligibility, and stale-claim handling.
rules.title: Large loss to senior adjuster in 24h
rules.titleZh: 大额损失24小时内指派资深理算员

statement.en: A Claim with an estimated total incurred loss at or above $500,000 must be assigned to a senior Adjuster within 24 hours of coverage confirmation.
statement.zh: 预估已发生损失总额达到或超过50万美元的理赔案件，须在承保确认后24小时内指派给资深理算员。

rules.formal: Claim.estimated_incurred >= 500000 → assign(senior Adjuster) within 24h of CoverageConfirmed

sources.snippet: **[BR-12]** A `Claim` with an estimated total incurred loss at or above **$500,000** must be assigned to a senior `Adjuster` within **24 hours** of coverage confirmation.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: No exposure closure with open reserve
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Exposure may not be closed while any Reserve balance remains greater than zero on that Exposure.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Assignment, closure, payment eligibility, and stale-claim handling.
rules.title: No exposure closure with open reserve
rules.titleZh: 有准备金余额不得关闭赔付项

statement.en: An Exposure may not be closed while any Reserve balance remains greater than zero on that Exposure.
statement.zh: 只要该赔付项上仍存在大于零的准备金余额，便不得关闭该赔付项。

sources.snippet: **[BR-13]** An `Exposure` may not be closed while any `Reserve` balance remains greater than zero on that `Exposure`.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: No payment when coverage out of force / denied
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A ClaimPayment may not be issued on an Exposure whose coverage decision is OutOfForce or CoverageDenied.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Assignment, closure, payment eligibility, and stale-claim handling.
rules.title: No payment when coverage out of force / denied
rules.titleZh: 承保失效或被拒时不得赔付

statement.en: A ClaimPayment may not be issued on an Exposure whose coverage decision is OutOfForce or CoverageDenied.
statement.zh: 承保决定为失效或被拒的赔付项不得签发理赔赔款。

sources.snippet: **[BR-17]** A `ClaimPayment` may not be issued on an `Exposure` whose coverage decision is `OutOfForce` or `CoverageDenied`.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Flag stale claim after 30 days inactivity
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Claim that has had no adjuster activity for 30 consecutive days must be flagged as stale and routed to the Claims Supervisor for review.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Assignment, closure, payment eligibility, and stale-claim handling.
rules.title: Flag stale claim after 30 days inactivity
rules.titleZh: 30天无活动则标记为陈旧案件

statement.en: A Claim that has had no adjuster activity for 30 consecutive days must be flagged as stale and routed to the Claims Supervisor for review.
statement.zh: 连续30天无理算员活动的理赔案件须被标记为陈旧并转交理赔主管复核。

sources.snippet: **[BR-18]** A `Claim` that has had no adjuster activity for **30 consecutive days** must be flagged as stale and routed to the Claims Supervisor for review.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Recovery only on closed claim with liable party
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Recovery may only be opened on a Claim that is closed and carries an identified liable third party.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Subrogation preconditions and immutable audit trail.
rules.title: Recovery only on closed claim with liable party
rules.titleZh: 仅对已结案且有责任方的案件追偿

statement.en: A Recovery may only be opened on a Claim that is closed and carries an identified liable third party.
statement.zh: 追偿仅可针对已结案且具有已识别责任第三方的理赔案件开立。

sources.snippet: **[BR-19]** A `Recovery` may only be opened on a `Claim` that is closed and carries an identified liable third party.

rules.specificScenarioStage: on any ClaimPayment or Reserve write
rules.businessLogicRuleName: Immutable audit of payments and reserve changes
rules.submissionCriteria: on any ClaimPayment or Reserve write
rules.standardizedLogicRule: Every ClaimPayment and every Reserve change shall be recorded with the acting user, timestamp, and prior value, and such audit records may not be altered or deleted.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Subrogation preconditions and immutable audit trail.
rules.title: Immutable audit of payments and reserve changes
rules.titleZh: 赔款与准备金变更不可篡改的审计

statement.en: Every ClaimPayment and every Reserve change shall be recorded with the acting user, timestamp, and prior value, and such audit records may not be altered or deleted.
statement.zh: 每笔理赔赔款与每次准备金变更须记录操作用户、时间戳与变更前值，且此类审计记录不得被修改或删除。

rules.formal: ∀ change(ClaimPayment ∨ Reserve) → audit{user, timestamp, priorValue} ∧ immutable(audit)

trigger.description: on any ClaimPayment or Reserve write

sources.snippet: **[BR-20]** Every `ClaimPayment` and every `Reserve` change shall be recorded with the acting user, timestamp, and prior value, and such audit records may not be altered or deleted.

actions.name: RecordSubmission
actions.description: Record a broker application package as a new Submission linked to an Applicant.
actions.descriptionZh: 将经纪人申请包登记为关联到申请人的新投保申请。

action_steps.name: receiveTheBrokerSApplicationPackage
action_steps.description: Receive the broker's application package (ACORD form + loss runs).

action_steps.name: createASubmissionInClearedFalse
action_steps.description: Create a Submission in Cleared = false and link it to the Applicant.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "RecordSubmission" action. Record a broker application package as a new Submission linked to an Applicant. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "RecordSubmission" using application_package, applicant. Record a broker application package as a new Submission linked to an Applicant. Produce submission and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Receive the broker's application package (ACORD form + loss runs).
text.zh: 接收经纪人申请包（ACORD表单+历史损失记录）。

text.en: Create a Submission in Cleared = false and link it to the Applicant.
text.zh: 创建Cleared=false状态的投保申请并关联申请人。

agent.toolDescription: Record a broker submission and run duplicate clearance.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`RecordSubmission`):** consumes the broker's application package (ACORD form + loss runs); produces a new `Submission` record in `Cleared` = false state and links it to an `Applicant`.

actions.name: AssessRisk
actions.description: Evaluate a cleared submission and produce a risk assessment with proposed coverages, flagging referrals.
actions.descriptionZh: 评估已查重的投保申请，产出含拟议险别的风险评估，并标记需转交项。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event SUBMISSION_CLEARED has been received
2. Rule "Duplicate clearance within 2 business days" is satisfied
3. Rule "TIV over $50M needs facultative reinsurance" is satisfied
4. Rule "Decline on 2+ total losses in 36m" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheSubmissionPlusLossRun
action_steps.description: Consume the Submission plus loss-run history and property characteristics.

action_steps.name: produceARiskAssessmentWithA
action_steps.description: Produce a RiskAssessment with a risk score and proposed Coverage list.

action_steps.name: flagForReferralWhenAnEligibility
action_steps.description: Flag for referral when an eligibility threshold is hit.

rules.name: Tier-1 cat zone or limit over $10M referral
rules.description: A Submission whose property is located in a Tier-1 catastrophe-exposed zone, or whose proposed limit exceeds $10,000,000, is required to be referred to an Underwriting Manager for approval before a Quote is issued.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "AssessRisk" action. Evaluate a cleared submission and produce a risk assessment with proposed coverages, flagging referrals. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "AssessRisk" using submission. Evaluate a cleared submission and produce a risk assessment with proposed coverages, flagging referrals. Produce risk_assessment, proposed_coverages and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume the Submission plus loss-run history and property characteristics.
text.zh: 采用投保申请及历史损失记录与财产特征。

text.en: Produce a RiskAssessment with a risk score and proposed Coverage list.
text.zh: 产出含风险评分与拟议险别清单的风险评估。

text.en: Flag for referral when an eligibility threshold is hit.
text.zh: 命中资格阈值时标记为需转交。

agent.toolDescription: Score a submission and propose coverages; flag referrals per BR-03.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`AssessRisk`):** consumes the `Submission` plus loss-run history and property characteristics; produces a `RiskAssessment` with a risk score and proposed `Coverage` list.

actions.name: ApproveReferral
actions.description: Underwriting Manager decision on a referred submission, producing an Approval.
actions.descriptionZh: 核保经理对转交的投保申请作出决定并产生批准记录。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event UNDERWRITING_REFERRAL_RAISED has been received
2. Rule "Tier-1 cat zone or limit over $10M referral" is satisfied

action_steps.name: reviewTheRiskAssessmentForThe
action_steps.description: Review the RiskAssessment for the referred Submission.

action_steps.name: produceAnApprovalApprovedDeclinedAttached
action_steps.description: Produce an Approval (Approved / Declined) attached to the Submission.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "ApproveReferral" action. Underwriting Manager decision on a referred submission, producing an Approval. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "ApproveReferral" using risk_assessment. Underwriting Manager decision on a referred submission, producing an Approval. Produce approval_decision and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Review the RiskAssessment for the referred Submission.
text.zh: 复核转交投保申请的风险评估。

text.en: Produce an Approval (Approved / Declined) attached to the Submission.
text.zh: 产出附于投保申请的批准记录（批准/拒绝）。

agent.toolDescription: Record a UW Manager approval or decline on a referred submission.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`ApproveReferral`):** consumes the `RiskAssessment`; produces an `Approval` record (Approved / Declined) attached to the `Submission`.

actions.name: GenerateQuote
actions.description: Compute premium via RatingEngine and produce a Quote with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits.
actions.descriptionZh: 通过费率引擎计算保费并产出含分项保费、免赔额与限额的报价。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event UNDERWRITING_RISK_ASSESSED has been received
2. Event UNDERWRITING_REFERRAL_APPROVED has been received
3. Rule "Minimum annual premium $2,500" is satisfied
4. Rule "Deductible minimum $5,000" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheApprovedRiskAssessmentAnd
action_steps.description: Consume the approved RiskAssessment and Coverage selections.

action_steps.name: callRatingEngineToComputePremium
action_steps.description: Call RatingEngine to compute Premium, applying the minimum-premium floor.

rules.name: Minimum annual premium $2,500
rules.description: A bound Policy must carry an annual Premium of at least the minimum-premium floor of $2,500, regardless of computed rate.

action_steps.name: produceAQuoteWithLineItem
action_steps.description: Produce a Quote with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits.

rules.name: Deductible minimum $5,000
rules.description: A Coverage deductible may not be set below the underwriting-guideline minimum of $5,000 for any commercial property peril.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "GenerateQuote" action. Compute premium via RatingEngine and produce a Quote with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "GenerateQuote" using risk_assessment, coverage_selections. Compute premium via RatingEngine and produce a Quote with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits. Produce quote, premium and emit the appropriate events.
tool_use: Synchronous REST to RatingEngine to compute Premium.

text.en: Consume the approved RiskAssessment and Coverage selections.
text.zh: 采用已批准的风险评估与险别选择。

text.en: Call RatingEngine to compute Premium, applying the minimum-premium floor.
text.zh: 调用费率引擎计算保费并应用最低保费下限。

text.en: Produce a Quote with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits.
text.zh: 产出含分项保费、免赔额与限额的报价。

sideEffects.description: Synchronous REST to RatingEngine to compute Premium.

agent.toolDescription: Rate and produce a Quote with premiums, deductibles, and limits.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`GenerateQuote`):** consumes the approved `RiskAssessment` and `Coverage` selections; calls RatingEngine to compute `Premium`; produces a `Quote` with line-item premiums, deductibles, and limits.

actions.name: BindPolicy
actions.description: Bind an accepted Quote into a Policy in Bound status, materializing coverages and premium.
actions.descriptionZh: 将已接受的报价承保为Bound状态的保单，落实各险别与保费。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event QUOTE_ACCEPTED has been received
2. Rule "Backdating / forward-dating window" is satisfied
3. Rule "Quote valid 60 days" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeAnAcceptedQuoteAndValidate
action_steps.description: Consume an accepted Quote and validate the effective-date window and quote validity.

rules.name: Backdating / forward-dating window
rules.description: A Policy may not be bound with an effective date more than 30 days in the past, and may not be bound with an effective date in the future beyond 90 days.

action_steps.name: produceAPolicyInBoundStatus
action_steps.description: Produce a Policy in Bound status with effective and expiry dates, materializing Coverage and bound Premium.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "BindPolicy" action. Bind an accepted Quote into a Policy in Bound status, materializing coverages and premium. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "BindPolicy" using quote. Bind an accepted Quote into a Policy in Bound status, materializing coverages and premium. Produce policy and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume an accepted Quote and validate the effective-date window and quote validity.
text.zh: 采用已接受的报价并校验生效日期窗口与报价有效期。

text.en: Produce a Policy in Bound status with effective and expiry dates, materializing Coverage and bound Premium.
text.zh: 产出Bound状态、具生效与失效日期的保单，并落实险别与已承保保费。

agent.toolDescription: Bind an accepted, valid quote into a Policy.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`BindPolicy`):** consumes an accepted `Quote`; produces a `Policy` in `Bound` status with an effective date and expiry date, materializing each `Coverage` and the bound `Premium`.

actions.name: IssuePolicyDocuments
actions.description: Generate declarations page and policy wording as a PolicyDocument stored in DocVault.
actions.descriptionZh: 生成声明页与保单条款作为存入DocVault的保单文件。

action_steps.name: consumeTheBoundPolicy
action_steps.description: Consume the bound Policy.

action_steps.name: produceTheDeclarationsPageAndPolicy
action_steps.description: Produce the declarations page and policy wording in DocVault.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "IssuePolicyDocuments" action. Generate declarations page and policy wording as a PolicyDocument stored in DocVault. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "IssuePolicyDocuments" using policy. Generate declarations page and policy wording as a PolicyDocument stored in DocVault. Produce policy_document and emit the appropriate events.
tool_use: Async upload of PolicyDocument to DocVault.

text.en: Consume the bound Policy.
text.zh: 采用已承保的保单。

text.en: Produce the declarations page and policy wording in DocVault.
text.zh: 在DocVault中生成声明页与保单条款。

sideEffects.description: Async upload of PolicyDocument to DocVault.

agent.toolDescription: Generate and store policy documents in DocVault.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`IssuePolicyDocuments`):** consumes the bound `Policy`; produces the declarations page and policy wording as a `PolicyDocument` stored in DocVault.

actions.name: RecordFNOL
actions.description: Record First Notice of Loss, creating a Claim linked to the matched Policy and opening exposures.
actions.descriptionZh: 登记首次报损，创建关联到匹配保单的理赔案件并开立赔付项。

action_steps.name: consumeTheReportedLossDetailsDate
action_steps.description: Consume the reported loss details (date of loss, cause, claimant).

action_steps.name: createAClaimLinkedToThe
action_steps.description: Create a Claim linked to the matched Policy.

action_steps.name: openAtLeastOneExposurePer
action_steps.description: Open at least one Exposure per affected Coverage.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "RecordFNOL" action. Record First Notice of Loss, creating a Claim linked to the matched Policy and opening exposures. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "RecordFNOL" using loss_details. Record First Notice of Loss, creating a Claim linked to the matched Policy and opening exposures. Produce claim, exposures and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Insert Claim and one Exposure per Coverage.

text.en: Consume the reported loss details (date of loss, cause, claimant).
text.zh: 采用报告的损失详情（出险日期、原因、索赔人）。

text.en: Create a Claim linked to the matched Policy.
text.zh: 创建关联到匹配保单的理赔案件。

text.en: Open at least one Exposure per affected Coverage.
text.zh: 为每个受影响险别开立至少一个赔付项。

sideEffects.description: Insert Claim and one Exposure per Coverage.

agent.toolDescription: Record FNOL, create a Claim, and open exposures per coverage.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`RecordFNOL`):** consumes the reported loss details (date of loss, cause, claimant); produces a new `Claim` linked to the matched `Policy`, and opens at least one `Exposure` per affected `Coverage`.

actions.name: VerifyCoverage
actions.description: Determine whether coverage was in force at the date of loss against the linked policy.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据关联保单判定出险日期是否在保险期间内。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event FNOL_RECORDED has been received
2. Rule "No coverage outside policy period" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheClaimDateOfLoss
action_steps.description: Consume the Claim date of loss and the linked Policy effective/expiry dates and Coverage terms.

action_steps.name: produceACoverageDecisionApplyingBR
action_steps.description: Produce a coverage decision applying BR-08 in-force date check.

rules.name: No coverage outside policy period
rules.description: No Coverage applies to a loss whose date of loss precedes the Policy effective date or follows the Policy expiry date.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "VerifyCoverage" action. Determine whether coverage was in force at the date of loss against the linked policy. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "VerifyCoverage" using claim, policy. Determine whether coverage was in force at the date of loss against the linked policy. Produce coverage_decision and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume the Claim date of loss and the linked Policy effective/expiry dates and Coverage terms.
text.zh: 采用案件出险日期及关联保单的生效/失效日期与险别条款。

text.en: Produce a coverage decision applying BR-08 in-force date check.
text.zh: 应用BR-08在保日期检查产出承保决定。

agent.toolDescription: Verify whether coverage was in force at the date of loss.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`VerifyCoverage`):** consumes the `Claim` date of loss and the linked `Policy` effective/expiry dates and `Coverage` terms; produces a coverage decision (`InForce` / `OutOfForce` / `NeedsReview`).

actions.name: AssignAdjuster
actions.description: Assign an adjuster to a claim and its open exposures, routing severe losses to senior adjusters.
actions.descriptionZh: 为理赔案件及其未结赔付项指派理算员，重大损失分配给资深理算员。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event COVERAGE_CONFIRMED has been received
2. Rule "Large loss to senior adjuster in 24h" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheClaimSeverityAndLine
action_steps.description: Consume the Claim severity and line of business.

action_steps.name: produceAnAdjusterAssignmentOnThe
action_steps.description: Produce an Adjuster assignment on the Claim and its open Exposures; route severe losses to senior adjusters.

rules.name: Large loss to senior adjuster in 24h
rules.description: A Claim with an estimated total incurred loss at or above $500,000 must be assigned to a senior Adjuster within 24 hours of coverage confirmation.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated system responsible for the "AssignAdjuster" action. Assign an adjuster to a claim and its open exposures, routing severe losses to senior adjusters. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "AssignAdjuster" using claim. Assign an adjuster to a claim and its open exposures, routing severe losses to senior adjusters. Produce adjuster and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume the Claim severity and line of business.
text.zh: 采用案件严重程度与业务线。

text.en: Produce an Adjuster assignment on the Claim and its open Exposures; route severe losses to senior adjusters.
text.zh: 在案件及其未结赔付项上产生理算员指派；重大损失分配给资深理算员。

agent.toolDescription: Assign an adjuster by severity and line of business.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`AssignAdjuster`):** consumes the `Claim` severity and line of business; produces an `Adjuster` assignment on the `Claim` and its open `Exposure`s.

actions.name: SetReserve
actions.description: Set an initial reserve amount on each open exposure, escalating large-loss reserves for approval.
actions.descriptionZh: 为每个未结赔付项设立初始准备金，大额损失准备金升级审批。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event EXPOSURE_OPENED has been received
2. Rule "Reserve >= $250,000 needs manager approval" is satisfied
3. Rule "Reserve set within 48 hours of FNOL" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheAdjusterSLossEstimate
action_steps.description: Consume the Adjuster's loss estimate.

action_steps.name: produceAReserveAmountOnEach
action_steps.description: Produce a Reserve amount on each open Exposure within 48 hours of FNOL.

rules.name: Reserve set within 48 hours of FNOL
rules.description: A Reserve must be set within 48 hours of First Notice of Loss on every open Exposure.

action_steps.name: escalateReservesAtOrAbove250
action_steps.description: Escalate reserves at or above $250,000 for Claims Manager approval.

rules.name: Reserve >= $250,000 needs manager approval
rules.description: A Reserve set at or above $250,000 on any single Exposure is required to receive Claims Manager approval before it is posted.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "SetReserve" action. Set an initial reserve amount on each open exposure, escalating large-loss reserves for approval. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "SetReserve" using exposure, loss_estimate. Set an initial reserve amount on each open exposure, escalating large-loss reserves for approval. Produce reserve and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Insert Reserve; audit prior value per BR-20.

text.en: Consume the Adjuster's loss estimate.
text.zh: 采用理算员的损失估算。

text.en: Produce a Reserve amount on each open Exposure within 48 hours of FNOL.
text.zh: 在报案后48小时内为每个未结赔付项产出准备金。

text.en: Escalate reserves at or above $250,000 for Claims Manager approval.
text.zh: 达到或超过25万美元的准备金升级至理赔经理审批。

sideEffects.description: Insert Reserve; audit prior value per BR-20.

agent.toolDescription: Set an initial reserve on an exposure; escalate large losses.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`SetReserve`):** consumes the Adjuster's loss estimate; produces a `Reserve` amount on each open `Exposure`. Must occur within **48 hours** of FNOL

actions.name: AdjustClaim
actions.description: Investigate and adjust an exposure, producing updated reserves and a recommended settlement amount.
actions.descriptionZh: 调查并理算赔付项，产出更新的准备金与建议结算金额。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event CLAIM_ASSIGNED has been received
2. Rule "Immutable audit of payments and reserve changes" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeInvestigationFindingsEstimatesAndSupporting
action_steps.description: Consume investigation findings, estimates, and supporting ClaimDocuments.

action_steps.name: produceUpdatedReserveValuesVersionedFor
action_steps.description: Produce updated Reserve values (versioned for audit) per Exposure.
action_steps.submission_criteria: on any ClaimPayment or Reserve write

rules.name: Immutable audit of payments and reserve changes
rules.submission_criteria: on any ClaimPayment or Reserve write
rules.description: Every ClaimPayment and every Reserve change shall be recorded with the acting user, timestamp, and prior value, and such audit records may not be altered or deleted.

action_steps.name: produceARecommendedSettlementAmountPer
action_steps.description: Produce a recommended settlement amount per Exposure.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "AdjustClaim" action. Investigate and adjust an exposure, producing updated reserves and a recommended settlement amount. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "AdjustClaim" using claim, claim_documents. Investigate and adjust an exposure, producing updated reserves and a recommended settlement amount. Produce reserve, recommended_settlement and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume investigation findings, estimates, and supporting ClaimDocuments.
text.zh: 采用调查结论、估算与支持性理赔文件。

text.en: Produce updated Reserve values (versioned for audit) per Exposure.
text.zh: 为每个赔付项产出更新且版本化用于审计的准备金。

text.en: Produce a recommended settlement amount per Exposure.
text.zh: 为每个赔付项产出建议结算金额。

agent.toolDescription: Investigate, update reserves, and recommend a settlement.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`AdjustClaim`):** consumes investigation findings, estimates, and supporting `ClaimDocument`s; produces updated `Reserve` values and a recommended settlement amount per `Exposure`.

actions.name: IssueClaimPayment
actions.description: Authorize and issue a claim payment, decrementing the reserve, subject to authority limits.
actions.descriptionZh: 在授权限额约束下授权并签发理赔赔款，并冲减准备金。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event SETTLEMENT_RECOMMENDED has been received
2. Rule "Adjuster payment authority $25,000" is satisfied
3. Rule "Supervisor / Manager payment escalation" is satisfied
4. Rule "No payment when coverage out of force / denied" is satisfied

action_steps.name: verifyTheExposureCoverageDecisionPermits
action_steps.description: Verify the exposure coverage decision permits payment.

rules.name: No payment when coverage out of force / denied
rules.description: A ClaimPayment may not be issued on an Exposure whose coverage decision is OutOfForce or CoverageDenied.

action_steps.name: checkAuthorityPaymentsAbove25000
action_steps.description: Check authority: payments above $25,000 need Supervisor, above $100,000 need Claims Manager.

rules.name: Supervisor / Manager payment escalation
rules.description: A ClaimPayment above the Adjuster authority limit must be approved by a Claims Supervisor, and a ClaimPayment above the Supervisor limit of $100,000 shall be escalated to the Claims Manager.

action_steps.name: produceAClaimPaymentAndDecrement
action_steps.description: Produce a ClaimPayment and decrement the Reserve on the paying Exposure.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "IssueClaimPayment" action. Authorize and issue a claim payment, decrementing the reserve, subject to authority limits. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "IssueClaimPayment" using exposure, settlement_amount. Authorize and issue a claim payment, decrementing the reserve, subject to authority limits. Produce claim_payment and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Verify the exposure coverage decision permits payment.
text.zh: 确认赔付项承保决定允许赔付。

text.en: Check authority: payments above $25,000 need Supervisor, above $100,000 need Claims Manager.
text.zh: 检查授权：超过2.5万美元需主管，超过10万美元需理赔经理。

text.en: Produce a ClaimPayment and decrement the Reserve on the paying Exposure.
text.zh: 产出理赔赔款并冲减赔付项上的准备金。

agent.toolDescription: Authorize and issue a claim payment within authority limits.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`IssueClaimPayment`):** consumes the approved settlement amount; produces a `ClaimPayment` and decrements the `Reserve` on the paying `Exposure`. A `ClaimPayment` above the Adjuster's **$25,000** authority requires a Supervisor `Approval`

actions.name: CloseExposure
actions.description: Close a fully-paid exposure (reserve zeroed); close the claim when all exposures are closed.
actions.descriptionZh: 关闭已全额赔付的赔付项（准备金归零）；当所有赔付项关闭时关闭案件。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event PAYMENT_ISSUED has been received
2. Rule "No exposure closure with open reserve" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheFullyPaidExposureBlock
action_steps.description: Consume the fully-paid Exposure; block while any Reserve balance remains.

rules.name: No exposure closure with open reserve
rules.description: An Exposure may not be closed while any Reserve balance remains greater than zero on that Exposure.

action_steps.name: produceAClosedExposureReserveZeroed
action_steps.description: Produce a closed Exposure (Reserve zeroed); close the Claim when all Exposures are closed.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "CloseExposure" action. Close a fully-paid exposure (reserve zeroed); close the claim when all exposures are closed. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "CloseExposure" using exposure. Close a fully-paid exposure (reserve zeroed); close the claim when all exposures are closed. Produce exposure and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Exposure.status := Closed; Claim.status := Closed when last.

text.en: Consume the fully-paid Exposure; block while any Reserve balance remains.
text.zh: 采用已全额赔付的赔付项；存在准备金余额时阻止关闭。

text.en: Produce a closed Exposure (Reserve zeroed); close the Claim when all Exposures are closed.
text.zh: 产出已关闭的赔付项（准备金归零）；当全部赔付项关闭时关闭案件。

sideEffects.description: Exposure.status := Closed; Claim.status := Closed when last.

agent.toolDescription: Close a fully-paid exposure and the claim when all are closed.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`CloseExposure`):** consumes the fully-paid `Exposure`; produces a closed `Exposure` (Reserve zeroed). When all Exposures on a `Claim` are closed, the `Claim` is closed.

actions.name: ReviewReserve
actions.description: Periodically review reserve adequacy on an open exposure, confirming or revising the reserve.
actions.descriptionZh: 定期复核未结赔付项的准备金充足性，确认或修订准备金。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event RESERVE_REVIEW_DUE has been received
2. Rule "Reserve reviewed every 90 days" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeTheOpenExposureAndElapsed
action_steps.description: Consume the open Exposure and elapsed time.

action_steps.name: produceAConfirmedOrRevisedReserve
action_steps.description: Produce a confirmed or revised Reserve; every open Exposure reviewed at least every 90 days.

rules.name: Reserve reviewed every 90 days
rules.description: Every open Exposure is required to have its Reserve reviewed for adequacy at least every 90 days.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated agent responsible for the "ReviewReserve" action. Periodically review reserve adequacy on an open exposure, confirming or revising the reserve. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "ReviewReserve" using exposure. Periodically review reserve adequacy on an open exposure, confirming or revising the reserve. Produce reserve and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume the open Exposure and elapsed time.
text.zh: 采用未结赔付项与已过时间。

text.en: Produce a confirmed or revised Reserve; every open Exposure reviewed at least every 90 days.
text.zh: 产出确认或修订的准备金；每个未结赔付项至少每90天复核。

agent.toolDescription: Review and confirm/revise reserve adequacy on an exposure.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`ReviewReserve`):** consumes the open `Exposure` and elapsed time; produces a confirmed or revised `Reserve`. Every open `Exposure` must be reviewed at least every **90 days**

actions.name: OpenSubrogation
actions.description: Open a recovery against an identified liable third party on a settled, closed claim.
actions.descriptionZh: 对已结案且有已识别责任第三方的案件开立追偿。
actions.submission_criteria:
1. Event CLAIM_CLOSED has been received
2. Rule "Recovery only on closed claim with liable party" is satisfied

action_steps.name: consumeASettledClaimWithIdentified
action_steps.description: Consume a settled Claim with identified third-party liability.

rules.name: Recovery only on closed claim with liable party
rules.description: A Recovery may only be opened on a Claim that is closed and carries an identified liable third party.

action_steps.name: produceARecoveryRecordTargetingThe
action_steps.description: Produce a Recovery record targeting the liable party.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "OpenSubrogation" action. Open a recovery against an identified liable third party on a settled, closed claim. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "OpenSubrogation" using claim. Open a recovery against an identified liable third party on a settled, closed claim. Produce recovery and emit the appropriate events.

text.en: Consume a settled Claim with identified third-party liability.
text.zh: 采用已结案且具第三方责任的案件。

text.en: Produce a Recovery record targeting the liable party.
text.zh: 产出针对责任方的追偿记录。

agent.toolDescription: Open a subrogation recovery on a closed claim with a liable party.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`OpenSubrogation`):** consumes a settled `Claim` with identified third-party liability; produces a `Recovery` record targeting the liable party.

actions.name: RecordRecovery
actions.description: Record funds received from the liable party and offset net incurred loss on the claim.
actions.descriptionZh: 登记从责任方收到的款项并冲抵案件净已发生损失。

action_steps.name: consumeFundsReceivedFromTheLiable
action_steps.description: Consume funds received from the liable party.

action_steps.name: produceAnUpdatedRecoveryAmountAnd
action_steps.description: Produce an updated Recovery amount and offset net incurred loss on the Claim.

actions.system_prompt: You are an automated human operator responsible for the "RecordRecovery" action. Record funds received from the liable party and offset net incurred loss on the claim. Read the required objects from the ontology, honor every precondition, and perform the steps in order.
actions.user_prompt: Execute "RecordRecovery" using recovery, funds_received. Record funds received from the liable party and offset net incurred loss on the claim. Produce recovery and emit the appropriate events.

data_changes.description: Update Recovery and Claim net incurred loss.

text.en: Consume funds received from the liable party.
text.zh: 采用从责任方收到的款项。

text.en: Produce an updated Recovery amount and offset net incurred loss on the Claim.
text.zh: 产出更新的追偿金额并冲抵案件净已发生损失。

sideEffects.description: Update Recovery and Claim net incurred loss.

agent.toolDescription: Record recovery receipt and offset claim net incurred loss.

sources.documentName: Standard Operating Procedure — Claims & Underwriting Operations (SOP-CLM-UW-014)
sources.snippet: **Action (`RecordRecovery`):** consumes funds received from the liable party; produces an updated `Recovery` amount and offsets net incurred loss on the `Claim`.

events.name: submission.received
events.description: A broker submission has been received in PolicyCenter.
events.descriptionZh: PolicyCenter已收到经纪人投保申请。

sources.snippet: **SubmissionReceived** | PolicyCenter | PolicyCenter (clearance) | `submission_id`

events.name: submission.cleared
events.description: Duplicate clearance completed for a submission per BR-01.
events.descriptionZh: 按BR-01完成投保申请查重。

events.name: underwriting.referral-raised
events.description: A submission hit a referral threshold and requires UW Manager approval.
events.descriptionZh: 投保申请命中转交阈值，需核保经理审批。

events.name: underwriting.risk-assessed
events.description: A submission has been risk-assessed without a referral.
events.descriptionZh: 投保申请已完成风险评估且无需转交。

events.name: underwriting.referral-approved
events.description: A UW Manager approved a referred submission.
events.descriptionZh: 核保经理已批准转交的投保申请。

events.name: underwriting.submission-declined
events.description: A submission was declined at referral.
events.descriptionZh: 投保申请在转交环节被拒绝。

events.name: quote.issued
events.description: A quote has been issued with line-item premiums.
events.descriptionZh: 已出具含分项保费的报价。

events.name: quote.accepted
events.description: The insured accepted a quote, enabling binding.
events.descriptionZh: 被保险人已接受报价，可进行承保。

events.name: policy.bound
events.description: A policy has been bound; consumed by BillingCenter to raise the first invoice.
events.descriptionZh: 保单已承保；由BillingCenter消费以开具首期发票。

sources.snippet: **PolicyBound** | PolicyCenter | BillingCenter | `policy_id`, `premium_id`

events.name: policy.issued
events.description: Policy documents issued and stored in DocVault.
events.descriptionZh: 保单文件已签发并存入DocVault。

sources.snippet: **PolicyIssued** | PolicyCenter | DocVault | `policy_id`

events.name: loss.reported
events.description: A loss has been reported, triggering FNOL recording.
events.descriptionZh: 已报告损失，触发报案登记。

sources.snippet: **LossReported** | ClaimCenter | ClaimCenter | `policy_number`, `date_of_loss`

events.name: fnol.recorded
events.description: FNOL recorded; a claim has been opened.
events.descriptionZh: 报案已登记；理赔案件已立案。

sources.snippet: **FNOLRecorded** | ClaimCenter | ClaimCenter (coverage) | `claim_id`

events.name: exposure.opened
events.description: An exposure has been opened for an affected coverage.
events.descriptionZh: 已为受影响险别开立赔付项。

sources.snippet: **ExposureOpened** | ClaimCenter | ClaimCenter (reserving) | `exposure_id`, `coverage_id`

events.name: coverage.confirmed
events.description: Coverage confirmed in force for a claim.
events.descriptionZh: 已确认理赔案件承保有效。

sources.snippet: **CoverageConfirmed** | ClaimCenter (via I3) | ClaimCenter (assignment) | `claim_id`, decision

events.name: coverage.denied
events.description: Coverage denied for a claim (loss outside policy period).
events.descriptionZh: 理赔案件承保被拒（出险在保险期间外）。

events.name: claim.assigned
events.description: An adjuster has been assigned to a claim.
events.descriptionZh: 已为理赔案件指派理算员。

events.name: reserve.set
events.description: A reserve has been set on an exposure.
events.descriptionZh: 已在赔付项上设立准备金。

events.name: reserve.approval-requested
events.description: A large-loss reserve (>= $250,000) awaits Claims Manager approval.
events.descriptionZh: 大额损失准备金（>=25万美元）待理赔经理审批。

events.name: reserve.adjusted
events.description: A reserve value has changed (adjustment or review revision).
events.descriptionZh: 准备金金额已变更（理算调整或复核修订）。

events.name: reserve.confirmed
events.description: A periodic reserve review confirmed adequacy without change.
events.descriptionZh: 定期准备金复核确认充足且未变更。

events.name: settlement.recommended
events.description: A recommended settlement amount has been produced for an exposure.
events.descriptionZh: 已为赔付项产出建议结算金额。

events.name: payment.authorization-requested
events.description: A claim payment above authority awaits supervisor/manager approval.
events.descriptionZh: 超授权的理赔赔款待主管/经理审批。

sources.snippet: **PaymentAuthorizationRequested** | ClaimCenter | ClaimCenter (supervisor queue) | `payment_id`, `amount`

events.descriptionZh: 理赔赔款已支付。

sources.snippet: **PaymentIssued** | BillingCenter | ClaimCenter | `payment_id`

events.name: exposure.closed
events.description: A fully-paid exposure has been closed with reserve zeroed.
events.descriptionZh: 已全额赔付的赔付项已关闭且准备金归零。

events.name: claim.closed
events.description: All exposures on a claim are closed; consumed by subrogation.
events.descriptionZh: 案件全部赔付项已关闭；由代位求偿消费。

sources.snippet: **ClaimClosed** | ClaimCenter | ClaimCenter (subrogation) | `claim_id`

events.name: reserve.review-due
events.description: A scheduled reserve adequacy review is due (>= 90 days since last review).
events.descriptionZh: 计划的准备金充足性复核已到期（距上次复核>=90天）。

events.name: subrogation.opened
events.description: A subrogation recovery has been opened against a liable party.
events.descriptionZh: 已针对责任方开立代位求偿。

events.name: recovery.received
events.description: Funds have been received from the liable party.
events.descriptionZh: 已收到责任方款项。

sources.snippet: **RecoveryReceived** | BillingCenter | ClaimCenter | `recovery_id`, `recovered_amount`

events.name: recovery.recorded
events.description: A recovery receipt has been recorded and offset against the claim.
events.descriptionZh: 追偿款入账并已冲抵案件损失。

Daily scan for exposures due review within 90 days.

ruleGroups.rationale: Clearance, referral, reinsurance, and decline gates before quoting.
Premium floor, deductible floor, quote validity, and effective-date window at quote/bind.
Reserve timing, periodic review, and large-loss approval.
Assignment, closure, payment eligibility, and stale-claim handling.
Subrogation preconditions and immutable audit trail.

history.note: Initial 5-stage extraction from SOP, business rules, and systems-data reference.

stageCritiques.objects: 13 object types extracted from the systems-data entity tables and SOP; all FKs resolve to in-ontology objects.
stageCritiques.rules: 20 rules mined sentence-by-sentence from BR-01..BR-20, grouped into 7 rule groups; all carry sentence-level citations.
stageCritiques.actions: 16 actions extracted from SOP steps A1-A6, B1-B7, C1, D1-D2 with typed IO, preconditions, triggeredBy/emits, and agent bindings.
stageCritiques.events: 29 events; 12 extracted from the systems-data event table, the rest inferred from action emits/triggers with derivedFrom. producedBy/consumedBy are the exact inverse of actions.
stageCritiques.processes: 4 processes (A-D) with event-driven step graphs; branches on referral and coverage decisions.
